sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93067" key="sa/kellos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάκελλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>,= foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάκελλοι διὰ πιτύρων</foreign> bran <sense id="n93067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poultices</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
